Petition For Order For Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Neutral Successor Trustee; For Injuctive Relief; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Dismissal
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Settlement And To Retain Jurisdiction Over Settlement Under Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Dec-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Betty Tang (Petitioner).

The Court noted that it now has Austin's declaration regarding authority to enter into settlement. The Court granted the Petition to Approve Settlement, etc. and the Petition for Approval of First Account, etc. (subject to review of the orders). The Petition for Order for Accounting; for Damages for Breach of Trust; for Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to January 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of a dismissal.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order For Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Neutral Successor Trustee; For Injuctive Relief; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Dec-24-2014 Continued To Jan-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of First Account And For Forensic Account By Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Approval Of First Account And For Forensic Account By Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Continued To Dec-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Settlement And To Retain Jurisdiction Over Settlement Under Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Continued To Dec-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Betty Tang (Trustee). Caroline Hinshaw for Daniel Louie (Beneficiary).

The Court questioned why the settlement agreement was not signed by Austin and instead was signed by Betty on his behalf. Mr. Der explained that the settlement agreement was not signed by Austin because he was stuck at the airport in San Diego during the mediation, that they were communicating with him by telephone, that there were questions and answers, that the mediator encouraged them to have someone sign on Austin's behalf and that Austin authorized Betty to sign the agreement. The Petition to Approve Settlement, Petition for Approval of First Account and the Petition for Order for Accounting, etc. were continued to December 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a declaration from Austin regarding proof of authorization to have entered into the settlement agreement.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order For Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Neutral Successor Trustee; For Injuctive Relief; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs

Petition For Order For Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Neutral Successor Trustee; For Injuctive Relief; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Continued To Oct-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of First Account And For Forensic Account By Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Continued To Sep-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for and with Daniel Louie. Ernest Der for and with Betty Tang. Austin Louie, David Louie and Bonnie King (Beneficiaries) also present.

Ms. Hinshaw stated that Daniel has agreed to get a re-appraisal of the house. Mr. Der suggested mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than September 26, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 26, 2014. The Petition for Approval of First Account, etc. and the Petition for Order for Accounting, etc. were continued to and the Parties are to return on September 30, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
